/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/EventPlanner.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/EventPlanner.dir/EventPlanner_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EventPlanner.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EventPlanner.dir/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EventPlanner.dir/monthview.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EventPlanner.dir/addeventview.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EventPlanner.dir/eventdetailsview.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EventPlanner.dir/datepickerpopup.cpp.o -o EventPlanner  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
